**âœ… S5b-eval DONE â€” per-campaign translation eval-judge model (XL, one loom, 3-service, 2026-06-10). ًںڈپ all 6 Model-Matrix roles configurable.** Design in the epic doc. **CLARIFY reframe:** the M7d-2 translation-fidelity judge ALREADY exists (`learning-service .../online_translation_judge.py`, invoked by `handlers._maybe_judge_translation` on `translation.quality`); it used a SERVICE-WIDE model. S5b-eval makes the MODEL per-campaign (NOT a new pipeline â€” investigate-before-you-build). **Thread:** `campaigns += eval_judge_model_source/ref` + `translation_jobs += eval_judge_model_source/ref` (migrations) â†’ driver â†’ translation dispatch â†’ persisted on the job â†’ published on the job msg â†’ coordinator â†’ per-chapter msg â†’ `_emit_translation_quality` rides the model + **force-feeds source/translated text** when set (campaign opt-in, independent of the `translation_judge_feed_enabled` flag). **learning:** `_maybe_judge_translation` uses the EVENT's model when present (campaign pick = opt-in, bypasses both global flags); bills the content owner. **Verdict emit (PO #3):** best-effort XADD `translation.eval_judged` â†’ **dedicated** `loreweave:events:translation_eval` stream (so learning doesn't consume its own emit) â†’ campaign projection consumer â†’ `campaign_chapters.eval_fidelity_score` (additive; `eval_status` STILL rides `translation.quality` â€” the judge is best-effort and must not gate completion). **VERIFY:** campaign **98**+6 skip آ· translation **547** (INSERT-arg assertions updated for the new trailing cols) آ· learning **134**. **/review-impl: coverage gap fixed** (createâ†’repo eval_judge persistence test) + LOWs accepted (per-emit redis conn; verdict-after-terminal not recorded; best-effort emit). No cross-tenant model leak; idempotent overwrite.

**âœ… `D-FACTORY-INFLIGHT-LOG` CLEARED (XL, one loom, single-service, 2026-06-11).** Plan [`docs/plans/2026-06-11-inflight-log.md`](../plans/2026-06-11-inflight-log.md). The monitor now has a timestamped **Recent activity** feed (ch.5 آ· translation آ· done آ· 12:03). **Key insight:** no new worker events needed â€” every stage transition is already `UPDATE campaign_chapters SET <stage>_status`, so a **Postgres AFTER-UPDATE trigger** (`trg_campaign_activity`) writes one append-only `campaign_activity` row per changed status across ALL paths (driver/consumer/reconcile/cancel), zero app instrumentation. `detail`=last_error only on `failed` (CASE-guarded â†’ no stale-error leak). BE: migration (table+index+trigger), `get_campaign_activity` (keyset recent-first), `GET /{id}/activity?limit&before_id` (owner-scoped). FE: `useCampaignActivity` (6s poll) + `ActivityLog` + pure `relTime`. **VERIFY:** campaign **175 passed** (incl 4 real-PG trigger tests: per-transition logging, eval+skipped branches, ignores non-status updates, keyset+scope); FE tsc 0 + vitest **41**; live: migration applied to populated dev DB on boot, `trg_campaign_activity`+`campaign_activity` present. **/review-impl: 1 LOW fixed** (eval/skipped trigger coverage) + 4 accepted (endpoint-level owner-scope, trigger column-drift risk, cancel-reads-as-failed, keep-all retention).

**Gap-fix deferred rows (with reason):**
- **`D-FACTORY-ACTIVITY-TRIM`** (new, perf-later) â€” `campaign_activity` is keep-all (bounded per campaign, ~16â€“32k rows for 4000 chapters); add a retention/trim job only if it ever matters at scale.
- Vision-beyond-MVP (unchanged): scheduling step, optional sample-run, sub-run child campaigns, CSV export, heatmap, compact-model role.

### â–¶ GLOSSARY ASSISTANT + `ai-gateway` (branch `feat/glossary-extracting-assistant`) â€” 2026-06-10

**State: P0â€“P6 + EDIT-ATOMIC BUILT + verified + BROWSER-LIVE-SMOKED â€” the glossary-assistant arc is COMPLETE.** Read + edit-existing (incl. multi-field atomic) + new-entity draft + schema-create, all human-gated, skill-guided, reachable on every book surface; grounding behind the gateway.

**â–¶ BROWSER LIVE-SMOKE (2026-06-10) â€” FULL LLM LOOP VERIFIED + 1 HIGH BUG FOUND+FIXED.** Stack up (api-gateway-bff:3123 + Vite:5174 + the rebuilt AI services), logged in as the test acct, opened a book's Glossary tab: **`BookAssistantDock` "Ask AI" renders + opens + the embedded chat mounts** (P5 surface âœ…). Started a chat on a tool-capable local model (Qwen3 Coder 30B) and asked "what kinds exist? use the glossary tools" â†’ the assistant **called `glossary_list_kinds` through the real chain (browserâ†’chatâ†’ai-gatewayâ†’glossary) and rendered the actual kinds + attributes** â€” the full LLM tool loop, driven by a real model, end to end âœ…. **HIGH bug caught (FIXED):** a federated MCP tool with an EMPTY input schema (`glossary_list_kinds`, empty Go input struct) converted to `parameters:{"type":"object"}` with **no `properties`** â†’ OpenAI-compatible providers (LM Studio) **400 the whole request** â†’ every book-scoped turn advertising the glossary tools failed. Fix: `chat-service` `get_tool_definitions` now normalizes every tool's `parameters` to include `properties:{}` (`_normalize_tool_parameters`). Verified live â€” the previously-400ing turn now succeeds. Unit + backend smokes missed it (no real-provider strict schema validation). Residual (small): the diff-card Apply + schema-confirm VISUAL flows need seeded entities to demo â€” backend real-PG-verified + FE unit-tested + the tool-call-through-gateway path now live-verified.

**â–¶ LIVE-SMOKE pass (2026-06-10, fresh branch images on the running stack) â€” cross-service wiring GREEN:** rebuilt ai-gateway + glossary + chat from HEAD and exercised the real chains. **ai-gateway** `/health/catalog` = **11 tools / 2 providers / not-partial** (P0 federation); MCP `tools/list` shows all 6 glossary tools incl. **P4 `glossary_propose_new_kind`/`_new_attribute`** + 5 `memory_*`. **Live execute through the gateway** (chatâ†’gatewayâ†’glossary, X-User-Id propagated = H3): `glossary_list_kinds` returned real schema; **P4 `glossary_propose_new_kind` as the real owner â†’ minted a `confirm_token` (no write)**; **as a wrong user â†’ `not accessible`+`isError` (SEC-2 ownership denial live)**. **P6 grounding proxy** `/internal/context/build`: with token â†’ real `KnowledgeContext` relayed from knowledge (HTTP 200); without token â†’ **401** (SO-1 gate). **Two stack blockers found + fixed:** glossary `UpWiki` migration was non-idempotent (dropped the wrong of two glossary FKs â†’ restart-time `wiki_articles_entity_id_fkey already exists`); ai-gateway healthcheck used `wget` (absent in the node image) â†’ permanently "unhealthy" â†’ blocked `chat`'s `depends_on`. **Decisions (9, all locked):** domain owns its MCP tools + a dedicated **`ai-gateway`** (TS/NestJS) federates them (consumers = chat + composition); **true MCP every hop** â€” glossary becomes a Go MCP server (official `modelcontextprotocol/go-sdk`), run **stateless + wrapped by our own net/http middleware** that lifts `X-User-Id`â†’ctx (PROVEN by the H3 spike, pattern in spec آ§20); `book_id` = LLM arg + **hard ownership** (book-service `verifyBookOwner`, cached, fail-closed); writes split (edit-existing = frontend-propose/Apply, new = draftâ†’AI-suggestions inbox); Tier-S schema = server-minted confirm-token (un-bypassable); gateway also consolidates grounding (mui#3) **with a mandatory `[]`-fallback**. P3 single-PATCH endpoints (patchEntity/patchAttributeValue + If-Match) untouched. No further glossary-assistant build/enhancement items queued.

**Deferred (accepted):**
- **GLOSSARY-ASSISTANT COVERAGE CAMPAIGN â€” architecture LOCKED 2026-06-10, build not started.** Gap analysis of the assistant vs 8 user scenarios + 18 more (S9â€“S26): backend (L1) is broad, the bottleneck is L2 (agent-reachable) â€” only 6 MCP tools + 2 frontend-tools, so most capability is unreachable by the agent. Docs: [`docs/specs/2026-06-10-glossary-assistant-scenario-coverage.md`](../specs/2026-06-10-glossary-assistant-scenario-coverage.md) (3-layer model + S1â€“S8) + [`-extended-scenarios.md`](../specs/2026-06-10-glossary-assistant-extended-scenarios.md) (S9â€“S26 deep-dive + **LOCKED decisions D1â€“D8** + revised build order). Decisions D1â€“D13 (all locked): cover ALL easyâ†’hard; first-class alias table (hard-cutover migrate, D11); Path B async; confirm-card+undo; glossary-SSOT relationships; staged web research; **honor share-grants**; global kinds + additive per-book **kind+attribute** derivation (D9); destructive = separate **manage**-grant tier (D10). **KEY FINDING (D13):** platform has NO collaborative-permission model (book = single owner; sharing = visibility-only). Honoring share-grants requires building a **Collaboration epic E0** (`book_collaborators` + role edit/manage + grant/revoke + UI) â€” **platform-wide, gates the whole campaign.** Architecture review ([`-architecture-review.md`](../specs/2026-06-10-glossary-assistant-architecture-review.md)) found holes + a **CRITICAL DEFECT (H-A)**: kind/attribute scoping was mis-implemented as one global-mutable catalog (`kinds_crud` = `requireUserID`-only) â€” original design is **3-tier (system-library / per-user / per-book derived)**; **tech debt to repay**, folded into F3 (not a re-decision). Other holes: H-B E0 blast-radius platform-wide; **H-C async chat-delivery unproven â†’ spike early**; H-D token vs change-set; H-E effective-schema readers + data model; H-G injection load-bearing at E0; H-J alias-cutover dedup risk. Wiki = OUT OF SCOPE (S32). Missing scenarios S27â€“S35 (import/series, templates, disambiguation, lifecycle, provenance, abuse/cost, observability). Build order: **Phase -1 E0 (collab) â†’ Phase 0 Foundational (F1 share-grant guard آ· F2 alias hard-cutover آ· F3 per-book kind+attr derivation آ· F4 card-family) â†’ Phase 1 Group-1 reads â†’ â€¦ â†’ Phase 8 web research.** Until E0 lands, assistant writes are owner-only. **NEXT = scope E0 as its own spec+plan (security-critical, AMAW), on a new branch `feat/glossary-assistant-coverage` from main AFTER PR #26 merges (D12).**
- **D-MCP-TASKS-MIGRATION** (new 2026-06-10) â€” MCP gained a native async primitive (**Tasks**, spec 2025-11-25, experimental; SEP-1686/1391). Our Go SDK `go-sdk v1.6.1` (latest published) has **no** Tasks support (verified); TS `^1.29` has it. We chose **Path B** (app-level job-handle on existing RabbitMQ/WebSocket) for S20. Revisit migrating to MCP-native Tasks when: Go SDK ships Tasks AND it leaves experimental AND someone designs task-proxying through the ai-gateway federation (currently per-call-fresh-client, INV-7/H14).
- **D-MCP-DIRECT-RETURN** (new 2026-06-10, user-observed during live-smoke) â€” token/latency optimization: for *display* tool-calls (e.g. `glossary_list_kinds`) the loop wastes a model turn re-narrating data the tool already returned. Plan + research captured in [`docs/plans/2026-06-10-mcp-direct-return-token-optimization.md`](../plans/2026-06-10-mcp-direct-return-token-optimization.md). Findings: MCP HAS `annotations.audience` (`user`/`assistant`, dual-channel) + `structuredContent`/`outputSchema`, but **no `returnDirect`** â€” "skip the model" is a `chat-service` agent-loop decision (cf. LangGraph `return_direct`), not an SDK feature. **Guardrail:** NOT blanket â€” `list_kinds` is usually a *means to an end* (propose-entity flow needs the model to read it); trigger must be conditional. Task to be picked up later.
- **067 / 068 â€” cross-service backend wiring LIVE-VERIFIED 2026-06-10** (gateway federation 11 tools/2 providers; live tool execute through the gateway; P6 grounding proxy â†’ real knowledge context). Residual = the LLM-driven full chat-turn (needs a provider) + the P5 browser surface (Playwright).
- **D-GLOSSARY-LIVE-SMOKE-BROWSER** â€” **mostly CLEARED 2026-06-10**: P5 dock surface + the full LLM tool loop (model â†’ `glossary_list_kinds` via gateway â†’ rendered) verified live in the browser; caught+fixed a HIGH tool-schema bug. **Residual (small):** the edit-existing diff-card Apply (P3/EDIT-ATOMIC) + schema-confirm card (P4) VISUAL flows â€” need a book with seeded entities to demo the card render + Apply-through-BFF; the server paths are real-PG-verified + the cards are FE-unit-tested + the LLM-tool-call path is now live. Reader-surface dock not yet clicked (same component as the glossary dock, just mount).
- **Accepted trade-offs (won't-fix, conscious)** â€” `ownerCache` never evicts expired entries (tiny, TTL-checked on read); 60s positive-TTL revocation lag (read-only); `GlossaryDiffCard` shows the LLM-claimed `old_value` (If-Match is the real guard); `BookAssistantDock` unmounts on GlossaryTab sub-views (chat session persists server-side); confirm-token is stateless (replay bounded by code-uniqueness 409); the glossary skill is injected even if glossary federation is down (the frontend write tools stay valid; a missing federated read tool yields a handled tool-not-found).

**Then â€” glossary LLM-flow migration (user directive 2026-06-10):** ai-gateway/MCP arrived AFTER the glossary pipeline, so existing glossary flows that drive LLMs **via prompt** (token-wasteful, unoptimized) should migrate to glossary MCP tools once the MCP exists. A full review of those flows is the immediate follow-on to P1 (see DEFERRED 066). *(Review starting this session â€” findings to be appended.)*

### â–¶ WIKI PHASE-2 (branch `wiki/phase2-change-control` off `main`) â€” change-control capture

**Phase-2a DONE** (glossary-only, /loom XL, **go build/vet clean آ· events 3/3 + api sweep 2/2 DB-integration on dev Postgres آ· LIVE-SMOKE PASSED on both streams**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the **DEFER capture layer** (آ§5.2). **PO: whole DEFER (consumer + sweep) + glossary Go consumer.** When a knowledge source an AI wiki article was built from changes, it records a `wiki_staleness` row + flips `is_knowledge_stale` â€” **ZERO LLM work** (regeneration is the user-gated آ§5.3 DECIDE half). Files: migration (`wiki_staleness` ledger: reason_code/source_ref/severity/status + idempotency partial-unique + feed index); `internal/events/staleness_consumer.go` (`StalenessConsumer` â€” 2-stream consumer group on `loreweave:events:{glossary,chapter}`, `stalenessRule` routing [entity_updatedâ†’entity_changed آ· entity_mergedâ†’merged آ· chapter.publishedâ†’chapter_regrounded آ· chapter.deleted/trashedâ†’citation_broken], `markArticlesStale` joins `wiki_article_source_usage` â†’ ledger + flag; mirrors the proven `revision_consumer`, forward-only `$`, idempotent); `cmd/.../main.go` wiring; `internal/api/wiki_staleness.go` (recipe-drift sweep endpoint `POST /internal/books/{id}/wiki/staleness-sweep` â€” stored vs current prompt/pipeline version). **/review-impl:** F1 (potential HIGH "are chapter events even relayed?") REFUTED + live-proven (bookâˆˆOUTBOX_SOURCES, aggregate_type='chapter' â†’ stream; chapter.deletedâ†’citation_broken live); F2/F4 accepted; F3 tracked (see below). **LIVE-SMOKE:** injected `glossary.entity_updated` â†’ Mina flagged (is_knowledge_stale fâ†’t + entity_changed/content/pending); injected `chapter.deleted` â†’ article flagged citation_broken/hard/pending.

**Phase-2b DONE** (cross-service glossary Go + frontend, /loom XL, **glossary 5 BE DB-integration tests on dev Postgres آ· FE vitest 31/31 آ· tsc 0 آ· i18n parity أ—4 (128) آ· LIVE-SMOKE full-stack PASSED**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the **آ§5.3 DECIDE / RESOLVE half** â€” the change-control loop now closes (captureâ†’deferâ†’**decide**). **PO: whole Phase-2b + batch-select+cost-estimate.** **Glossary:** `wiki_writeback.go` resolves an article's pending staleness â†’ `regenerated` in-tx on an AI write (the **F3 fix**; the flag was already cleared); `wiki_staleness.go` +`GET /v1/glossary/books/{id}/wiki/staleness` (feed, severity-ordered) +`POST â€¦/staleness/{id}/dismiss` (accept-as-is, **clears `is_knowledge_stale` when the last pending row goes**); `is_knowledge_stale` exposed on article list/detail reads. **Frontend:** `useWikiStaleness` (feed + dismiss), `KnowledgeUpdatesPanel` (grouped-by-reason, severity badge, **multi-select â†’ batch regenerate** via the M7b dialog with deduped `entity_ids`), an **"Outdated"** badge (sidebar + header) + a count banner; `useWikiGenJob` completion now refreshes the feed. i18n أ—4 `staleness.*`. **Folded a latent M7b-2b bug** (the main-return GenerateWikiDialog lacked `entityIds` â†’ single-article regenerate would have opened in batch-by-kind mode). **LIVE-SMOKE:** feed (citation_broken/hard sorts first) â†’ dismiss (2â†’1) â†’ **resolve-on-regen** (regenerated Count Dracula via the full FEâ†’glossaryâ†’knowledge path; stalenessâ†’`regenerated`, flag cleared) â†’ human-editedâ†’suggestion (no auto-resolve, spec-correct). The live-smoke **caught + fixed** the dismiss-flag-clear bug. **ًںڈپ wiki change-control (Phase-2) COMPLETE** (capture + defer + decide). **/review-impl deferrals:** D-WIKI-P2B-SUGGESTION-RESOLVE (accepting a regen-suggestion should resolve staleness), D-WIKI-P2B-COST-ESTIMATE (precise Nأ—$ vs count+cap).

**D-WIKI-P2B-SUGGESTION-RESOLVE DONE** (glossary-only, /loom M, **go build/vet clean آ· api suite green 12.0s incl 4 new DB-integration tests on dev Postgres**, /review-impl 1 fixed): closes the DECIDE loop for **human-edited** articles. `reviewWikiSuggestion` now resolves the article's pending `wiki_staleness`â†’`regenerated` + clears `is_knowledge_stale` on **any** accept (PO Q1: any-accept); a **reject** intentionally leaves it stale (the source change is still unaddressed). **Folded a latent bug:** an AI regen the clobber-guard filed as a suggestion stores an ENVELOPE in `diff_json` (`{body_json,generation_status,generation_provenance}`) â€” the old accept path applied that envelope *verbatim* as the article body (corrupting it). Now an AI-regen accept **unwraps** the real body + **restores** the generation metadata + logs an **`'ai'`** revision (badges/provenance correct; future regens overwrite freely instead of re-piling suggestions). Detection = envelope carries body_json **and** a validated generation_status (a TipTap doc has neither). **/review-impl** hardened the discriminator (was body_json-only â†’ a client-crafted diff could masquerade as a regen + NULL-out gen metadata) + a regression test. Files: `wiki_handler.go` آ· `wiki_suggestion_resolve_test.go` (new). **ًںڈپ wiki change-control DECIDE loop now complete for both AI-owned and human-edited articles.**

**D-WIKI-P2B-COST-ESTIMATE DONE** (cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go + frontend, /loom L, **go build/vet clean آ· glossary api suite green 9.96s (+4 gen-config tests) آ· knowledge wiki 15 (+2) آ· FE vitest 14 (+3 estimate) آ· tsc 0 آ· i18n parity أ—4**, /review-impl 1 fixed): a pre-flight `~N أ— $rate â‰ˆ $total` estimate in the Generate dialog. **PO: flat per-article أ— N via a read endpoint; surface in the dialog only** (token-precise stays D-WIKI-M6-PRECISE-COST). Single source: knowledge `GET /internal/knowledge/wiki/gen-config` (flat `wiki_gen_cost_per_article_usd` â€” the same figure the budget gate charges) â†’ glossary owner-gated proxy `GET /v1/glossary/books/{id}/wiki/gen-config` â†’ FE `useQuery` (LLM path only). Estimate is **precise** in regen mode (N = selected entities) and **rate-only** in batch mode (count unknown pre-flight); hidden on the deterministic path. **/review-impl** added a `Number.isFinite` guard (a non-numeric backend value would have rendered "$NaN"). Files: `internal_wiki.py` آ· `knowledge_client.go` آ· `wiki_jobs.go` آ· `server.go` آ· FE `api.ts`/`types.ts`/`GenerateWikiDialog.tsx`/`WikiTab.tsx` + i18n أ—4. **D-WIKI-P2-KG-SWEEP DONE** (cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go, /loom L load-bearing, **knowledge wiki/context 159 [+5 kg-hashes] آ· glossary api suite green 10.76s [+8: 4 sweepKgDrift DB + 3 client hop + null-hash] آ· go build/vet clean آ· i18n parity أ—4**, /review-impl 1 MED + 2 LOW fixed): the **KG-neighbourhood drift** half of the pull sweep (GAP A â€” Neo4j relationship edits emit no event). **PO: fold into the existing `/staleness-sweep`; degrade gracefully on knowledge-unreachable.** Knowledge: promoted `_gather_kg`â†’**`gather_kg_facts`** (public) + `POST /internal/knowledge/books/{id}/wiki/kg-hashes` `{user_id, entity_ids}` â†’ `{hashes}` recomputing each entity's CURRENT `kg_neighborhood_hash` via the **SAME** `gather_kg_facts`+`stable_hash(sorted(...))` path as generation (`kg_limit=DEFAULT_KG_LIMIT`) â€” **parity by construction**; a Neo4j-unavailable entity is **OMITTED** (never empty-hashed â†’ no false-flood). Glossary: `fetchKgHashes` client + `sweepKgDrift` (stored `build_inputs.kg_neighborhood_hash` vs current â†’ `kg_drift` row [`content`] + `is_knowledge_stale`, idempotent on the drifted-from hash) **folded into `sweepWikiStaleness`** behind an optional `user_id` (Neo4j tenant); knowledge-down degrades to `(0,nil)`. **/review-impl:** MED â€” chunked the kg-hashes call (â‰¤50/entity, continue-on-chunk-error) so a large book doesn't blow the 5s client timeout into a silent no-op; LOW â€” `kg_drift` i18n label أ—4 + `COALESCE`/skip a null stored hash (+test). Files: `context.py` آ· `internal_wiki.py` آ· `knowledge_client.go` آ· `wiki_staleness.go` + i18n أ—4 + tests. **W3 DONE â€” generate-dialog + sidebar polish (FE-only, /loom M, FE wiki+book-tabs vitest 61/61 [GenerateWikiDialog 13 incl +kind_codes آ· new WikiSidebar 2] آ· tsc clean آ· eslint clean آ· i18n parity أ—4, /review-impl 1 LOW folded + 2 accepted):** the generate dialog's `''`-vs-model overload became an explicit **segmented mode toggle** [Mل؛«u cل»‘ ؤ‘ل»‹nh | AI tل؛،o sinh], and the sidebar header now shows the **AI-authored split**. **PO (CLARIFY): AI-no-model disables Confirm آ· sidebar N=loaded list, M=AI within.** **`GenerateWikiDialog`:** new `mode: 'stub'|'llm'` (segmented control for batch; regen has no toggle = always AI); stub mode hides the model picker + spend cap; AI mode shows the picker with a disabled `pickRequired` placeholder; `selectMode('stub')` clears the picked model + spend (kills the token-spend leak the M7b-2a F1 also guarded); `canConfirm` requires a model in AI mode; a11y `role=radiogroup`+`aria-label`. **`WikiTab` `WikiSidebar`:** `aiCount` memo (`generation_status != null`) â†’ header `t('articles',{count:articles.length})` + `آ· t('aiSplit',{count:aiCount})`; **exported `WikiSidebar`** for isolated testing; dropped the now-redundant `total` prop (server `total` is still the empty-state gate â€” the loaded-list count is the right number for the header, matching the rendered rows). i18n أ—4 `gen.mode.{label,stub,llm}` + top-level `aiSplit`(+`_other`). **/review-impl:** F1 (LOW, **folded**) â€” added a `kind_codes` batch pass-through test (the deterministic-by-kind path was untested; W3 didn't change the logic but the refactored test file is its home). **Accepted:** F2 (LOW) AI-mode-with-zero-models is a soft dead-end but the toggle-back-to-stub escape exists (not a regression); F3 (COSMETIC) the open-reset effect could reset mid-open if `entityIds` ever became reachable while open â€” currently unreachable behind the modal. **No BE/contract change.** Plan W3 section.

**W4a DONE â€” persist per-entity job results + live pass tracking (knowledge-only, /loom L, knowledge wiki sweep 248â†’249 [orchestrator 12 incl +4 W4a آ· lifecycle +1 status projection] آ· ruff clean, /review-impl 1 LOW folded + 1 MED + 2 LOW tracked):** the screen-â‘¢ results-table data layer. **PO (CLARIFY): rich-but-compact results + BUILD live pass tracking** (not deferred). Glossary's job-status proxy returns the knowledge body **verbatim** (`io.ReadAll`), so this is knowledge-only â€” new fields flow to the FE with zero glossary change. **Schema (`migrate.py`, additive `ALTER`):** `results JSONB DEFAULT '{}'` (entity_id â†’ `{outcome, citations, flags, name}`) + `current_entity_id`/`current_pass`. **Repo (`wiki_gen_jobs.py`):** `WikiGenJob` +3 fields (+`_parse_obj`); `record_result` (idempotent `|| jsonb_build_object` upsert); `set_progress`; live pointer cleared in `pause`/`complete`/`fail`, reset in `mark_running`. **Orchestrator (`orchestrator.py`):** `_generate_one` â†’ `EntityResult{outcome,citations,flags,name}`; writes a preliminary `processing` row once the name is known (live row nameable; queued entities absent), `set_progress` before each pass (`contextâ†’generateâ†’verifyâ†’reviseâ†’writeback`), records the final result for **every** outcome (incl. `writeback_failed`/`skipped`/defensive `error`); per-pass writes are best-effort (`_set_pass`/`_record` swallow + debug-log). **Status (`internal_wiki.py`):** `WikiGenJobStatus` +`results`/`current_entity_id`/`current_pass`. **/review-impl:** #4 (LOW, **folded**) non-zero citation/flag capture test. **Tracked:** **`D-WIKI-W4-RESULTS-64KB`** (MED) â€” a >~600-entity job nears the glossary proxy's 64KB `io.LimitReader` body cap â†’ truncated JSON breaks the whole poll; mitigations: name truncated to 60 + compact detail; real fix (W4b/ops) = bump the proxy cap or cap/paginate `results`. **#2 (LOW)** the defensive `error` path clobbers the name (rarely fires â€” `_generate_one` never raises). **#3 (LOW)** a crash mid-entity leaves a stale `processing` row (resume overwrites). **`D-WIKI-W4A-LIVE-SMOKE`** â€” the repo upsert/clear SQL is mocked (knowledge units mock the pool, per M7b precedent); a real generate â†’ poll showing per-entity results + live `current_pass` advancing is the stack-up smoke. **âœ… W2 STALENESS-AUTO-FIRE â€” ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED + LIVE-PROVEN (2026-06-11/12, `/loom` M, this session).** The "entity_updatedâ†’staleness didn't auto-fire" symptom was **not** a W2/consumer bug â€” the staleness consumer, outbox relay, and W6b diff all work. The gap was one **missing emit**: `patchAttributeValue` (the handler the **manual entity editor uses for attribute fields like "Description"**) wrote the value + bumped the entity version but emitted **no** `glossary.entity_updated` event â†’ manual attribute edits reached neither wiki-staleness, glossary_syncâ†’Neo4j, nor learning-service. (In E2E the description edit went through this path â†’ nothing fired; the SQL-`short_description` workaround also bypassed the app.) **Fix:** `patchAttributeValue` now wraps its write in a tx and emits the event transactionally (`actor_type='user'`, before/after â€” parity with `patchEntity`), with the K3.3b `short_description` regen moved **inside** the tx so the after-snapshot reflects it (new `pgxExecQuerier` lets the regen helper run on pool or tx). Files: [`attribute_handler.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/attribute_handler.go) + [`apply_edit_handler.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/apply_edit_handler.go) (regen call sig) + new [`attribute_handler_test.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/attribute_handler_test.go). **Verify:** 9/9 change tests green on a fresh DB (pkg-wide 9 fails = pre-existing shared-DB isolation, proven identical via stash); **live smoke:** PATCH ه¼ è‹¥ه°ک desc via gateway â†’ 200 â†’ `glossary.entity_updated(user)` â†’ relay â†’ StalenessConsumer â†’ **auto `wiki_staleness` pending + `is_knowledge_stale=true`** (~30s relay-batch latency; dedup verified on و± ç‘¶). 0-diff non-description edits â†’ learning `noop` class (excluded by default) â€” benign, same as `patchEntity`.

**â–¶ NEXT â€” natural moves:** (1) open a **PR** `wiki/phase2-change-control` â†’ main (branch pushed); (2) remaining live-smokes: **`D-WIKI-W5-LIVE-SMOKE`** (flagged-article revise-override), earlier P2/M8; (3) the **`D-WIKI-W4-RESULTS-64KB`** proxy-cap fix + **`D-WIKI-W6B2B-REGATHER-COST`** perf; (4) the **platform system-config UI** epic once its auth-conflict clears.

**â–¶ M8 flywheel COMPLETE; the wiki Phase-2 branch is at a clean stopping point.**

**D-PLATFORM-SYSTEM-CONFIG-UI â€” CLARIFY+PLAN DONE, BUILD DEFERRED (conflict-blocked, DEFERRED 075).** Scoped the admin/system-config epic to surface the M8 flags (+ all ops flags) at runtime without an env redeploy. **PO-locked at CLARIFY:** full RBAC آ· runtime-apply via shared store + cached reads آ· all typed config (bool+int+float) آ· sliced **S0â†’S4** (each its own `/loom`) آ· config store = **new `config-service`** (Go/Chi). Architecture + per-slice file targets/acceptance/tests are written up: spec [`2026-06-11-platform-system-config-ui.md`](../specs/2026-06-11-platform-system-config-ui.md) + plan [`2026-06-11-platform-rbac-system-config.md`](../plans/2026-06-11-platform-rbac-system-config.md). **BUILD intentionally NOT started** â€” another agent is concurrently making large auth/permission changes; S0 (RBAC) lands in the same auth-service files (high conflict risk). **Pick-up:** wait for that work to merge to `main`, re-baseline S0 against the new auth shape (reuse, don't duplicate), branch `platform/rbac-system-config` off main, `/loom` S0 from CLARIFY. **/review-impl MANDATORY on S0/S1** (privilege-escalation surface).

- **D-WIKI-P2-SWEEP-DISMISS-RESWEEP** â€” a *dismissed* drift row (recipe + kg) is re-filed by the next sweep (the `ON CONFLICT â€¦ WHERE status='pending'` guard doesn't see dismissed rows). Pre-existing with recipe-drift; needs a dismiss-vs-resweep suppression design.
- **D-WIKI-P2-KG-SWEEP-PROJECT-PARITY** â€” the sweep resolves `projects[0]` fresh while generation froze `job.project_id`; single-project-safe but a multi-project book could false-drift. Store the generating `project_id` in `build_inputs` to make it project-exact.

### â–¶ WIKI LLM-BUILDING (branch `wiki/llm-gen` off `main`) â€” M0â†’M8 + M7a COMPLETE + live-smoke PASSED + MERGED (PR #28) (2026-06-11)

**State: DESIGN v3 complete (spec + mockup) + 2 pre-existing data-loss bug fixes BUILT & committed** (first commits on the branch, *before* the feature â€” `/loom` L, **17 tests green on real Postgres**, /review-impl clear).

**Bug fixes (this commit):**
- **Bug 1** â€” merge silently abandoned a loser's `wiki_article` when BOTH sides had one (violated merge-spec AC4 "no silent data loss"; composed with Bug 2 into permanent loss). **Fix:** `wiki_articles.superseded_by_entity_id` archive-in-place (revision-preserved) + `getWikiArticle` redirectâ†’winner (`redirected_from`) + `merge_journal.superseded_wiki_article_id` for symmetric un-merge. Bodies NOT auto-merged (deferred to wiki-LLM آ§5.4).
- **Bug 2** â€” kind-delete `ON DELETE CASCADE` silently destroyed articles+revisions+suggestions. **Fix:** entity FK `CASCADEâ†’RESTRICT` + kind-delete deletes articles explicitly + **count in 200** response (was silent 204) + `wiki.deleted` outbox event (both kind-delete & user-delete, atomic in-tx). superseded_by FK `ON DELETE SET NULL` (anti-dangle).
- Files: `migrate.go` آ· `merge_handler.go` آ· `wiki_handler.go` آ· `kinds_crud.go` آ· `outbox.go` + tests (`wiki_dataloss_test.go` new, `merge_handler_test.go`/`kind_aliases_test.go`). Plan [`2026-06-08-wiki-dataloss-bugfix.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-wiki-dataloss-bugfix.md).
- **/review-impl:** 0 HIGH; 1 MED (redirect untested â†’ HTTP test added w/ a **book-service mock harness** â€” reusable for the LLM feature) + 4 LOW + 1 COSMETIC **all fixed + re-verified**.

**Design (spec v3 [`2026-06-08-wiki-llm-building.md`](../specs/2026-06-08-wiki-llm-building.md) آ· mockup `-mockup.html`, 5 screens):** wiki = **deferred-sync materialized view** over a versioned knowledge base. Home = **knowledge-service** (Python; glossary stays SSOT front door). LLM contract = **constrained Markdown â†’ IR â†’ deterministic TipTap mapper** (NOT LLM-emits-TipTap). Generate = **bounded multi-pass** (writeâ†’deterministic rule-gateâ†’CanonVerifierâ†’1أ—revise, keep-if-improved). **Change-control:** capture (MVP: `wiki_article_source_usage` + `build_inputs` fingerprint) â†’ defer (DB `wiki_staleness` ledger + sweep, **NOT realtime CDC**) â†’ decide (**user-gated** regen, cost-capped). Locked PO decisions: BookProfileâ†’**move to book-service**; spoiler = capture-horizon + reader-gate; ledger = DB-table+sweep; feedback+eval flywheel in MVP.

**MERGED to main (PR #25 @ 2ace6272):** bug-fixes + design v3. **Phase-1 plan committed** (`e9313ef0`, [`2026-06-08-wiki-llm-gen-phase1.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-wiki-llm-gen-phase1.md)) â€” contract-first (IR آ· Markdownâ†’IRâ†’TipTap آ· **citation mark = anti-hallucination feature, FE+BE** آ· writeback/schema/fingerprint), M0-M8 milestones, 15 risks surfaced.

**BookProfile decision REVERSED â†’ option (A):** STAYS in lore-enrichment (AI-domain, LLM detection `profile_suggest.py`), read via a NEW internal-token `GET /internal/lore-enrichment/books/{id}/profile` â€” NOT moved to book-service (Go/CRUD can't host the LLM detection = wrong boundary). **LE-runner verified:** build a fresh ~150-line wiki orchestrator reusing the generic job infra (state-machine/cost-budget/events/meter/LLM-seam/verify-gate), NOT clone the gap/proposal-coupled `JobRunner`.

**M0 DONE** (`app/wiki/`, knowledge-service, pure, /loom L, **ruff + 14 unit tests green**, /review-impl clear): render-agnostic **IR** (`WikiArticleIR/Block/Span/Source`) + **dep-free constrained-markdownâ†’IR parser** (cite-lift آ· drop-unknown-as-hallucinated آ· grounded-flag آ· spoiler `source_chapter_max`) + **mappers** `IRâ†’TipTap` (ContentRenderer vocab + `citation` mark w/ jump-anchor + References) آ· `IRâ†’markdown` (round-trips) آ· `IRâ†’plaintext`. /review-impl: removed dead `quote` block-type (round-trip drift) + 3 coverage tests; LOW-3/4 documented.

**M1 DONE** (cross-service: lore-enrichment + knowledge-service, /loom M, **LE pytest 19/19 + knowledge client 7/7 green**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): BookProfile read via **option A** (LE stays the authored home). LE: NEW `internal_router` + `GET /internal/lore-enrichment/books/{book_id}/profile` ([`app/api/book_profile.py`](../../services/lore-enrichment-service/app/api/book_profile.py); `require_internal_token` guard, reuses `get_book_profile`+`_profile_view`, neutral-default never-404, no owner-check = internal token is the trust boundary; additive). knowledge: NEW `app/clients/book_profile_client.py` â€” frozen `BookProfile` (worldview/language/era_policy/voice/anachronism_markers) + `BookProfileClient` with **TTL cache (PO decision B, 60s)** â€” one HTTP call per book per job, edited profile picked up after TTL, **a failed read is NOT cached** (transient LE-down/recovery retries next call) + graceful-degrade-to-neutral (mirrors `BookClient`, never raises). config (`lore_enrichment_service_url`/timeout/`book_profile_cache_ttl_s`) + compose `LORE_ENRICHMENT_SERVICE_URL`. /review-impl: 1 LOW fixed (malformed-typed-200â†’neutral degrade test pins the never-raise invariant vs pydantic ValidationError-subclass version-drift); 3 documented (unbounded-but-tiny cache won't-fix آ· silent cross-svc drift â†’ tracked by live-smoke آ· `require_internal_token` sibling-import cosmetic).

**M2 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L, **ruff + retriever 5 + context 7â†’9 + raw_search 23 (behavior-preserved) + 280 sweep green**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): retrieval+context layer. **`app/search/retriever.py`** = `run_hybrid_search` fusion core EXTRACTED from the `search_book` HTTP handler â€” takes an **already-resolved `project`** (caller owns the ownership gate; 404 stays at HTTP layer), **never raises** (degraded markers, not HTTPException), identical lexical+semantic+RRF+rerank+floor+cap. Handler now delegates (behavior preserved = the 23 endpoint tests are the guard). **`app/wiki/context.py`** = `gather_entity_context` â€” glossary brief (`fetch_entities_by_ids`) + 1-hop KG (`find_relations_for_entity`) + passages (in-process `run_hybrid_search`, query = name+aliases); **sanitizes ALL untrusted text** (name/kind/aliases/desc/KG/passages) via the existing `injection_defense.neutralize_injection` SDK shim; assigns **gapless cite-labels G1/K1../P1..** â†’ M0 IR `Source` table; `ContextSource` separates full prompt-text from truncated stored snippet; `None` on missing/nameless entity; degrades on not_indexed/KG-down (risk #9). **`app/wiki/__init__.py` kept PURE** (context imported directly, not re-exported, to keep the IR surface dep-light). **Q2-B (sanitizeâ†’SDK) was already satisfied** by mui#3 + knowledge's K-adopt shim â†’ REUSED (zero SDK edit, zero LE re-point). /review-impl: 3 LOW fixed (passage label-gap running-counter, kind_code sanitize, whitespace-skip + 2 tests), 1 accepted (retrieverâ†”context seam-mock).

**M3 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L, **ruff + prompt 7 + rulegate 4 + generate 7 = 18 green + 318 wiki sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the **single-pass generation proof**. **`app/wiki/prompt.py`** (pure) = `build_messages(brief, profile, items)` â†’ constrained-Markdown contract (## sections / prose / `-` bullets / `>` enriched-only) + **cite-only-our-labels** + synthesize-don't-copy + **#14 no-infobox-restate** + BookProfile-shaped language/voice/era/anachronism; renders `[cite_id] (kind) FULL-text`. **`app/wiki/rulegate.py`** (pure) = `evaluate(ir) â†’ GateResult` â€” **Q2-A permissive**: pass iff non-empty âˆ§ â‰¥1 grounded cited claim (no-hollow-stub); ungrounded ratio is a SOFT reason, not a fail (CanonVerifier M4 is the real gate). **`app/wiki/generate.py`** = `generate_article(context, profile, llm, â€¦)` â€” buildâ†’`submit_and_wait("chat")`â†’`parse_article`(M0)â†’gateâ†’**bounded 1أ— corrective retry**â†’typed `GenerateResult{status: ok|skipped_no_grounding|empty|llm_failed, ir, gate, attempts, raw_markdown, degraded}`; **never raises**; **reuses the existing `LLMClient`** (NOT cloned â€” knowledge already has it). **Q1-A**: takes a PRE-BUILT context+profile (M6 orchestrates the gather/cost loop). risk #6 = `max_tokens` budget + total parser. /review-impl: 2 LOW fixed (M2 `context.degraded` now carried through `GenerateResult`; +test that `[FICTIONAL]`-tagged context survives into the prompt = M2 defense effective at the prompt boundary), 2 accepted (build_messages safe for pydantic-validated inputs; mis-citation is M4's job).

**M4 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L â€” *reclassified XLâ†’L mid-CLARIFY when Q2-B's cross-service scope dissolved*, **ruff + canon 6 + verify 10 + cite 5 + revise 6 = 27 green + 395 wiki sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the grounding-SDK quality gate wrapping M3's result. **`app/wiki/canon.py`** = `extract_canon_terms` (jieba CJK proper-nouns + Latin Capitalized, ported from LE `canon_lookup.py`, conservative/under-fires) + `make_canon_lookup(brief)` over the entity `short_description` (**Q2-B collapsed single-service**: glossary's canon IS the `short_description` column, already in the M2 context â†’ NO new glossary endpoint). **`app/wiki/verify.py`** = IRâ†’`ProposalLike` + **section-level `FactLike[]`** (Q1-A) adapters â†’ SDK `CanonVerifier` (injection/anachronism/regurgitation/contradiction) â†’ `verify_article â†’ WikiVerifyResult{passed, publish_blocked, reject_reason, degraded, flags[]}`; **`decide_auto_reject` ported VERBATIM** from LE `wiring.py` (injection / HIGH-contradiction / â‰¥2-distinct-anachronism / HIGH-regurgitation â†’ publish-blocked). **`app/wiki/cite.py`** = `compose_provenance_cites` â€” actually-cited sources â†’ `GroundingCite` â†’ **`compose_cites` (SDK's FIRST live consumer**, risk #5); glossary canon (score None) ranks first; uncited dropped. **`app/wiki/revise.py`** = `revise_article` 1أ— verify-corrective re-gen + **publish-block-aware `is_improved` keep-if-improved** (never worsens); `generate.py` +`initial_corrective` (additive). jieba added to `requirements.txt`. /review-impl: 1 LOW fixed (keep-if-improved was count-only â†’ block-aware `is_improved` + regression test), 1 noted (D-WIKI-M4-NEUTRALIZED), 1 accepted (degraded vestigial â€” in-memory canon never raises).

**M5 DONE** (cross-service: glossary Go + knowledge Py, /loom XL, **glossary writeback 11/11 incl 7 clobber-guard DB tests LIVE on dev Postgres + wiki/merge green آ· knowledge fingerprint 5 + writeback 10 + 117 sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the WRITE path. **Glossary:** migration (C6 â€” 6 `wiki_articles` gen cols + `wiki_article_source_usage` table + stub-revision `ownerâ†’'system'` migration; **+ FIXED a latent non-idempotent FK migration** â€” the Bug-2 block matched ANY FK to glossary_entities but BOTH entity_id_fkey & superseded_by_fkey do, so an unordered SELECT dropped superseded_by and failed to apply CASCADEâ†’RESTRICT; the entity FK was STILL CASCADE on dev â€” now column-targeted+idempotent, RESTRICT live-verified). `wiki_writeback.go` = `POST /internal/books/{id}/wiki/articles` (X-Internal-Token) with **clobber-guard as an ALLOWLIST** (overwrite ONLY `ai`/`system` draft; human/unknown author â†’ `wiki_suggestion`, never clobbered) + source_usage replace + `wiki.generated` outbox, all in-tx. stub `author_type='owner'â†’'system'` going forward (REQUIRED for clobber correctness). **Knowledge:** `fingerprint.py` (C7 `build_inputs` + ported `_stable_hash`, Python-only), `writeback.py` (`build_writeback_body`: M0 `ir_to_tiptap` + M4 cites/flags + آ§5.1 source_usage reverse index + generation_status generated/needs_review/blocked), `glossary_client.write_wiki_article` (graceful-degrade). /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (clobber denylistâ†’allowlist), 2 LOW accepted (stub-summary detection; D-WIKI-M5-SUGGESTION-DEDUP regen pile-up).

**M6 DONE** (cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go, /loom XL, **knowledge orchestrator 7 + trigger 4 + consumer-drain 3 + 149 wiki sweep آ· glossary go build green آ· per-book lock LIVE-VERIFIED on dev Postgres**, /review-impl 0 HIGH): the integration capstone tying M2â†’M5 per entity. **ًںڈپ Phase-1 LLM wiki-generation pipeline (M0â€“M6) COMPLETE.** **Knowledge:** `wiki_gen_jobs` table (mirror extraction_jobs + book_id/entity_ids/items_done + **partial-unique per-book lock** `(book_id) WHERE active`, risk #13) + `WikiGenJobsRepo` (createâ†’`ActiveJobExists` 409, atomic mark_entity_done, **list_resumable**) + **`app/wiki/orchestrator.py`** `run_wiki_gen_job` (fresh ~150-line per-entity pipeline: gather_contextâ†’generateâ†’verifyâ†’reviseâ†’cite+fingerprintâ†’build_bodyâ†’writeback; **budget-pause-before-spend**, **skip-done resume**, **never-raises-per-entity**; risk #12 reuse-generic-not-clone-LE) + trigger `POST /internal/knowledge/books/{id}/wiki/generate` (202/404/409/400 + XADD `loreweave:events:wiki-gen`) + flag-gated stream consumer (`wiki_gen_processor`, OFF by default, **startup-drain of orphaned pending/running jobs**) + lifespan wiring + config flags. **Glossary:** `generateWikiStubs` `model_ref`â†’**delegate** to the knowledge trigger (additive; deterministic stub = untouched fallback). /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (orphan-drain durability â€” was: re-trigger 409s + '$' skips â†’ stuck job leaks the lock), 1 LOW fixed (writeback-failure surfacing), 2 documented (D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP multi-replica, D-WIKI-M6-RESUME).

**Branch `wiki/llm-gen` (off main `2ace6272`):** M0â€“M6 + E2E-smoke + M7a PUSHED to origin (`e9313ef0` plan آ· `12956b1e` M0 آ· `fc969f03` M1 آ· `1cdf53ee` M2 آ· `f982f7c4` M3 آ· `a3505367` M4 آ· `6e420c30` M5 آ· M6 آ· `24a8d973` E2E آ· `409956bd` M7a). M7a + M7b-1/2a/2b PUSHED to origin (`409956bd`آ·`fbf230e7`آ·`4c853c43`آ·`dd2f4493`); **origin `wiki/llm-gen` @ `dd2f4493`**. M0â†’M7b complete + live-smoke PASSED. Branch ready for a PR to main when M8 lands (or merge the LLM-gen feature now if desired).

**âœ… E2E LIVE-SMOKE PASSED (2026-06-09, `D-WIKI-M6-E2E-LIVE-SMOKE` cleared â€” collapsed M3/M4/M5 smokes too):** rebuilt knowledge+glossary, created a project for the Dracula book `019e97e4` (36 entities), enabled `WIKI_GEN_ENABLED`, triggered 3 entities via **gemma-4-26b** (model `51ea9fd7`, LM Studio). Job `pendingâ†’runningâ†’complete 3/3`. Articles landed in glossary with full `generation_provenance` (C7 build_inputs fingerprint + M4 citations 1â€“2 each + verify_flags), آ§5.1 `source_usage` (entity+block rows), `generation_status` generated/needs_review, **citation marks `[1][2]` in the TipTap body** (C3/M0), and the **clobber-guard live** ('system' stub â†’ 'ai' overwrite). The whole M0â†’M6 pipeline works end-to-end on real services + a real LLM. **M7a DONE** (frontend, /loom L, **vitest 6/6 + tsc 0 + i18n parity أ—4**, /review-impl 0 HIGH): the anti-hallucination **CitationMark** trust layer. `components/reader/CitationChip.tsx` = `[n]` chip + hover/focus **popover** (cited snippet â€” NO live fetch â€” + source badge + relevance % + **jump-to-source** `/books/{id}/chapters/{ch}/read?block=N`, reusing raw-search P3-A precise-scroll); `CitationContext.tsx` = optional bookId provider (no prop-drill); `InlineRenderer` routes the `citation` mark â†’ chip (body = superscript via the mapper's separate superscript mark; References = full-size w/ label intact); `components/editor/CitationMark.ts` = `Mark.create` (attrs match M0 JSON â†’ citations survive edits) registered in `TiptapEditor`. Wrapped `WikiTab`'s reader in `CitationProvider`; the shared `InlineRenderer` covers the public reader too (jump link appears when a provider gives bookId, else popover-only â€” still auditable). i18n أ—4 `reader.citation.*`. /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (keyboard a11y â€” focus-within so the jump link is tab-reachable), 1 LOW fixed (score `[0,1]` guard); a review-found References-label-drop bug fixed in REVIEW. **Note:** no dedicated public wiki-article FE PAGE exists yet â€” when one lands, wrap its `ContentRenderer` in `CitationProvider` for jump links.

**M7b-1 DONE** (BE slice; cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go, /loom XLâ†’sliced, **knowledge wiki pytest 108/108 [incl 9 new job-lifecycle + 1 orchestrator-abort] آ· glossary go vet/build/api-pkg green [+7 proxy/client/auth tests]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the job-lifecycle BE the FE (M7b-2) sits on. **PO decisions: glossary-proxy surface (B)** [FE talks ONLY to `/v1/glossary`; glossary forwards to knowledge internal] **+ slice BE-first**. **Knowledge:** `WikiGenJobsRepo` +`get_latest_for_book(book,user)` (poll â€” returns the latest job regardless of status, unlike active-only `get_active_for_book`) +`resume` (pausedâ†’pending, SQL-guarded) +`cancel` (pending|pausedâ†’cancelled, releases the per-book lock via the existing partial-unique index â€” no migration) +`_affected` tag-parse; `internal_wiki.py` +`GET â€¦/wiki/job?user_id=` (404 no-job) +`POST â€¦/job/{id}/resume` (validate owner+pausedâ†’repo.resume+XADD re-enqueue; 409 not-paused) +`POST â€¦/job/{id}/cancel` (owner+pending|paused; **409 on running**). **Glossary:** `knowledge_client.go` +`getWikiGenJob`/`wikiGenJobAction` (PROPAGATE status, not degrade-to-nil â€” user-initiated); `wiki_jobs.go` +3 proxy handlers (JWT + `verifyBookOwner` â†’ pass user_id to knowledge) + `/wiki/job` routes; `wiki_handler.go` exposes **`generation_status`** (list) + **`generation_provenance`/`generated_at`** (detail) for the needs_review/blocked badges (C6 cols, no migration; public reads verified safe â€” bespoke projections). **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** `mark_running` was an unguarded write â†’ a cancel landing before the orchestrator started was silently resurrected (run + token-spend); now a **claim** (`AND status IN ('pending','running')` + rows-affected) and the orchestrator **aborts** (returns 'cancelled') when it can't claim. F2/F3/F4 LOW accepted. **Closes D-WIKI-M6-RESUME.**

**M7b-2a DONE** (frontend only, /loom XLâ†’sliced, **vitest 18/18 [hook 7 + dialog 5 + banner 6] آ· tsc 0 آ· i18n parity أ—4 [82 keys]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the FE generate-dialog + job lifecycle. **PO decisions: unified Generate dialog (A)** [model dropdown defaults to "Deterministic stubs (no LLM)"; picking a chat model â†’ LLM gen] **+ single-article-regen-with-tiny-BE (â†’2b)** **+ slice 2a/2b**. `features/wiki/`: `types.ts` (`WikiGenJobStatus` + `WikiGenerateResult` union), `api.ts` (`generateStubs` +model_ref/model_source/max_spend_usd typed union; `getJob`/`resumeJob`/`cancelJob`), `hooks/useWikiGenJob.ts` (controller â€” poll `getJob` `refetchInterval` 2s while pending|running / off otherwise / 404â†’null; `trigger` branches deterministic-vs-delegate + handles 202/409/404/none with toasts; `resume`/`cancel`; completionâ†’article-list invalidate as a ref-guarded sync-effect), `components/GenerateWikiDialog.tsx` (model picker + optional kind filter + spend-cap; reset-on-open), `components/WikiGenJobBanner.tsx` (status/progress strip; resume on paused, cancel on pending|paused, **no controls while running** â€” BE 409s running-cancel). `WikiTab.tsx`: Sparkles opens the dialog (was one-click stub) + renders the banner. i18n أ—4 `gen.*`. **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** the always-mounted dialog persisted a prior LLM selection across reopen â†’ defeated the deterministic default + risked an unintended token-spend; now resets to defaults on open. F3 COSMETIC fixed (once-guard test); **F2 LOWâ†’D-WIKI-M7B-GEN-LIMIT**; F4 accepted.

**M7b-2b DONE** (cross-service glossary Go + frontend, /loom XL, **frontend vitest 26/26 [hook 7 + dialog 6 + banner 6 + badge 4 + flags 3] آ· tsc 0 آ· i18n parity أ—4 [101 keys] آ· glossary go vet/build/api-pkg green [+2 parseEntityUUIDs tests]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): badges + verify-flags + single-article regenerate. **PO: Regenerate on ALL articles (B)** [clobber-guard files a `wiki_suggestion` for a human-edited one]. **Glossary:** `generateWikiStubs` +`entity_ids` passthrough in the delegate branch via `resolveDelegateEntityIDs` (UUID-validated â†’ 400 on bad; **book-scoped** â€” explicit ids filtered to in-book active entities). **Frontend:** `types.ts` (+`generation_status` on list+detail, `WikiVerifyFlag`, `WikiGenerationProvenance`), `api.ts`/`useWikiGenJob` (thread `entity_ids`), `components/WikiGenBadge.tsx` (needs_review/blocked/generated chip; subtle on sidebar rows), `components/VerifyFlagsPanel.tsx` (verify-flag display: kindآ·dimensionآ·evidence, severity-colored), `GenerateWikiDialog.tsx` (**regen-mode**: requires a model [deterministic skips article-having entities], sends `entity_ids`, hides the kind filter), `WikiTab.tsx` (badge on sidebar rows + article header + **Regenerate** button + flags panel). i18n أ—4 `gen.regen*`/`badge`/`flags`. **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** the explicit `entity_ids` path validated UUID format but NOT book ownership (unlike the batch path) â€” a client could trigger generation on a foreign entity (writeback's `entBook != bookID` guard blocked the *write*, but generation still ran on wasted tokens); now book-scoped at the glossary owner-gate layer. F2/F3 LOW accepted. **ًںڈپ wiki LLM-gen FE (M7a + M7b-1/2a/2b) COMPLETE.**

**âœ… D-WIKI-M7B-LIVE-SMOKE PASSED (2026-06-10)** â€” rebuilt knowledge+glossary on the M7b code (origin pushed to `dd2f4493`), drove the whole FEâ†’glossaryâ†’knowledge path through the gateway (JWT, test acct, Dracula book `019e97e4`, model `51ea9fd7` gemma-4-26b): (1) **M7b-1 reads** â€” `generation_status` on the wiki list (Mina/Count=`generated`, Jonathan Harker=`needs_review`), full `generation_provenance` on detail (citations/verify_flags/build_inputs/model_ref), the job-status endpoint = `complete 3/3`; (2) **M7b-2b** â€” a real `needs_review` verify-flag (`regurgitation/medium`, the VerifyFlagsPanel payload), **single-article Regenerate** via the `entity_ids` passthrough â†’ `202` â†’ `complete 1/1` â†’ article revision bumped + fresh `generated_at`; (3) **F1 book-scoping** â€” a FOREIGN `entity_id` â†’ `{"action":"none"}` (filtered, no job), malformed â†’ `400`, mixed foreign+own â†’ `202` (own-only); (4) **job lifecycle** â€” budget-pause (`max_spend=0.001` â†’ `paused reason=budget`) â†’ **RESUME** (`202`, pausedâ†’pending) â†’ **CANCEL** (`200 cancelled`) â†’ **lock released** (fresh trigger `202`, not `409`). Zero 500s. Closes D-WIKI-M6-RESUME live too. (Dev note: `KNOWLEDGE_WIKI_GEN_ENABLED=true` on the running knowledge container until its next plain recreate.)

**M8 DONE** (cross-service glossary Go + knowledge Py, /loom XL, **knowledge eval pytest 7/7 آ· glossary go vet/build green + 3 M8 emit DB-integration tests PASS on dev Postgres آ· LIVE-SMOKE PASSED**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the feedback flywheel (emit) + thin advisory eval. **PO: whole M8 + eval via the glossary API (A).** **Glossary:** `outbox.go` +`wiki.corrected` (transactional, emitted from `patchWikiArticle` when the prior latest revision was `author_type='ai'` â†’ the AI-draftâ†’human-edit gold pair; carries `prior_generation_status`) +`wiki.suggestion_reviewed` (from `reviewWikiSuggestion`, action + `was_ai_generated`). **MVP = emit-only** (the `learning-service` consumes the gold as few-shot in a follow-up; knowledge's event dispatcher routes by type + safely skips these). **Knowledge:** `app/benchmark/wiki/metrics.py` (pure: `verify_flag_rate` over the list's `generation_status`, `citation_resolvability` over body citation marks = snippet+anchor present) + `run_wiki_eval.py` (reads via the glossary API, `--gate` advisory) + 7 unit tests. **/review-impl F2 (MED) fixed:** a human correction now CLEARS `generation_status`+`generation_provenance` in the same tx (the human owns it â†’ the stale needs_review badge + verify-flags panel disappear; the AI-origin audit lives in the revision history + the `wiki.corrected` event). **LIVE-SMOKE (2026-06-10):** eval harness GATE PASS over the live API (3 AI articles, verify-flag-rate 0.33, resolvability 1.00); `wiki.corrected` outbox row confirmed after a live AI-article PATCH. **ًںڈپًںڈپ wiki LLM-generation feature COMPLETE: M0â†’M8 + M7a all built, reviewed, and live-proven.**

**â–¶ NEXT SESSION â€” wiki is feature-complete; remaining is Phase-2 + follow-ups:**
1. **Open a PR** `wiki/llm-gen` â†’ `main` (M0â†’M8 + M7a; live-smoke passed) when ready to land the feature.
2. **Phase-2** (change-control: `wiki_staleness` ledger + a fingerprint sweep over the M5 `build_inputs` + the "Knowledge updates" change-feed â€” see spec آ§5.2/آ§5.3 + plan آ§IV).
3. **Follow-ups (spec آ§11):** learning-service consumer of `wiki.corrected`/`suggestion_reviewed` (gold â†’ few-shot in `prompt.py`); LLM-judge groundedness eval; per-step model routing.

**Recently cleared (wiki):** âœ… **D-WIKI-M6-RESUME** (2026-06-10, M7b-1 â€” resume (pausedâ†’pending+re-enqueue) + cancel (releases the per-book lock) endpoints shipped via the glossary proxy; /review-impl F1 hardened `mark_running` into a claim so a cancel can't be resurrected) آ· âœ… **D-WIKI-M6-E2E-LIVE-SMOKE** + **D-WIKI-M3/M4/M5-LIVE-SMOKE** (2026-06-09 â€” the full M0â†’M6 pipeline generated 3 Dracula articles end-to-end on the live stack via gemma-4-26b; provenance + source_usage + citation marks + clobber-guard all verified live, see the âœ… block above) آ· âœ… **D-WIKI-M1-LIVE-SMOKE** (the BookProfile read ran in the live generation path â€” neutral default, no profile set on the Dracula book).

**Deferred (wiki):**
- âœ… **D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP DONE (2026-06-18, /loom S).** `run_wiki_gen_consumer` converted from bare `XREAD '$'` â†’ a Redis consumer **group** (`wiki-gen-workers`) with a per-process consumer name (`hostname-pid`) + ack-after-process: with â‰¥2 knowledge replicas each job message is now delivered to exactly ONE replica (no double LLM spend). Group create is `MKSTREAM`+BUSYGROUP-safe (idempotent); the read loop (`_consume_batch`, factored for testability) tails `'>'`; `CancelledError` re-raised for clean shutdown. `drain_resumable_jobs` stays the row-based crash-durability backstop (so no DLQ/reclaim scaffold needed). +4 unit tests (process-then-ack, empty-noop, malformed-still-acks, BUSYGROUP-safe-create+close). Deferred: `D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP-LIVE-SMOKE` (multi-replica exclusivity needs 2 live replicas + flag-on â€” not smoke-able single-replica; correct by XREADGROUP construction + unit-tested).
- **D-WIKI-M7B-RUNNING-CANCEL** (M7b-1 DESIGN) â€” cancel is scoped to pending|paused (the stuck-lock case is budget-`paused`). A *running* job returns 409: the orchestrator processes entities sequentially without polling status mid-loop, so a cooperative running-cancel needs a per-entity status re-check (abort between entities). The M7b-2a banner reflects this (no cancel button while running). Add when an operator needs to stop a long in-flight run; today it self-terminates (complete/pause) and the F1 claim-guard prevents a cancelled job from being resurrected.
- **D-WIKI-M8-LEARNING-CONSUMER** (M8 follow-up, spec آ§4.11) â€” the `wiki.corrected`/`wiki.suggestion_reviewed` events are EMITTED (transactional outbox â†’ `loreweave:events:glossary`) but not yet CONSUMED. Build the learning-service consumer (`corrections` + `quality_scores`, target_kind='wiki_article') + feed the gold AI-draftâ†’human-edit pairs as few-shot into `prompt.py`. The emit contract is live; the consumer is the flywheel's second half.
- **D-WIKI-M8-EVAL-PLUS** (M8 follow-up, spec آ§4.12) â€” the eval is thin/advisory (verify-flag-rate + citation-resolvability, deterministic). Follow-ups: coverage (`recall_at_k`), LLM-judge groundedness + a discrimination probe, a Fengshen golden corpus, and persisting runs for trend tracking. Wire the `--gate` into CI once thresholds are calibrated on a real corpus.
- **D-WIKI-M7B-GEN-LIMIT** (M7b-2a /review-impl F2) â€” the glossary delegate's `resolveWikiGenEntities` defaults to `genLimit=50`; a book with >50 entities of a chosen kind generates only the first 50, and the banner's "50/50" reads as complete (the drop is silent). Pre-existing (M6) but the M7b-2a UI surfaces it. Expose a limit control in the Generate dialog, or have the delegate return a `dropped` count the banner can show.
- **D-WIKI-M6-PRECISE-COST** (M6) â€” the cost-cap charges a configured per-article ESTIMATE (`wiki_gen_cost_per_article_usd`), not real tokens (the LLMClient meters via provider-registry but doesn't surface per-call cost to the orchestrator). Wire real per-job metering when the provider-registry usage seam is exposed.
- **D-WIKI-M5-LIVE-SMOKE** (M5, cross-service) â€” the clobber-guard SQL + migration are live-proven against dev Postgres (via the HTTP handler), but the full **knowledgeâ†’glossary network POST** round-trip (knowledge's `write_wiki_article` actually calling a running glossary) isn't exercised yet. It collapses into the M6 end-to-end live-smoke (a real entity generates â†’ writes back on the live stack).
- **D-WIKI-M5-SUGGESTION-DEDUP** (M5 /review-impl LOW-3) â€” repeated AI regen over a human-edited article files a NEW `wiki_suggestion` each time (no dedup) â†’ can pile up in the review queue. Accept for M5 (M6 controls regen cadence); add upsert-by-(article, pending) or a "latest AI suggestion wins" rule if it surfaces.
- **D-WIKI-M4-LIVE-SMOKE** (M4, risk #5) â€” CanonVerifier + `compose_cites` are unit-tested only; the first live run over REAL retrieved passages (verify flags + provenance cites on the actual stack) rides with M6 when generation runs end-to-end. `compose_cites` is the SDK's first live consumer â€” verify the real-passage dedup/rank then.
- **D-WIKI-M4-NEUTRALIZED** (M4 /review-impl LOW-2) â€” `verify_article` drops the SDK `VerifyResult.neutralized` map (safe text for injection-flagged fields). Fine at M4 (publish-blocked articles aren't persisted as-is), but **M5 must persist the neutralized text** if it stores a flagged article as a `wiki_suggestion`. Thread `neutralized` through `WikiVerifyResult` when M5 wires the suggestion path.

Built E0â€“E4: **E0** seed `scripts/seed_rawsearch_eval.py` + in-container `app/benchmark/ingest_rawsearch_corpus.py` â†’ imported **40 ch of ن¸‡هڈ¤ç¥‍ه¸‌** (book `019ea2fc-ffc7-7dc6-8f09-1f8625584b59`, project `019ea2fd-0523-7c3d-ab59-72c0c0a73a3b`, test acct) â†’ **3337 chapter_blocks (lexical) + 115 `:Passage` (semantic, local bge-m3, FREE)**; **E1** golden `app/benchmark/rawsearch_golden.json` (18 oracle-mined queries â€” 12 exact/3 paraphrase/3 negative, graded for NDCG); **E2** `app/benchmark/metrics.py` +`hit_at_k`+`ndcg_at_k` (**pytest 15/15**); **E3** runner `scripts/run_rawsearch_eval.py` (3 modes أ— K + per-mode table); **E4** `app/benchmark/flat_knn_rawsearch.py` (exact-cosine ANN baseline). **Live results:** hybrid **MRR 0.97 / hit@5 1.0 / ndcg@5 0.86** > lexical & semantic on every metric (RRF earns its keep); **ANN recall 0.96** (index near-exact); embeddings proven real (stored vector â‰، fresh LM-Studio re-embed, **cosine 1.0**). **Two real product findings â†’ E5:** lexical **oracle-recall 0.63** (`limit=10`+cap=3 under-cover wide terms) and **score = positional RRF floor 0.0164** (non-calibrated, can't threshold junk). Verdict: **good at finding (jump-to-source), mediocre at exhaustive mining (recall)** â€” bones good, recall needs one tuning pass.

**E5 recall + calibrated score + golden expansion (L, 2026-06-08):** plan [`2026-06-08-raw-search-e5-tuning.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-raw-search-e5-tuning.md). **Root cause of recall 0.63:** lexical SQL returned a flat block `LIMIT` â†’ wide-term blocks clustered into few chapters. **Fix:** `granularity=chapter|block` â€” `chapter` = best-block-per-chapter window-fn SQL (`lexicalSearchChapterSQL`, max distinct-chapter recall / navigate; **new default**), `block` = all matching blocks (exhaustive mine); per-hit **`relevance`** (0â€“1: lexical sim/1.0-exact, semantic cosine) added on both legs + `apply_relevance_floor` (`min_relevance` param). Orchestrator: `cap=1` (chapter) / lifted (block); floor applied post-fusion. Golden expanded **18â†’33** via committed `scripts/build_rawsearch_golden.py` (exact incl. wide / phrase / paraphrase / **typo** / negative). **book-service** go green آ· **knowledge pytest 43/43**. **Isolated live result (new code, SAME old golden â€” apples-to-apples):** lexical **oracle-recall 0.63â†’0.953**, lexical recall@10 0.57â†’0.83, hybrid recall@10 0.75â†’**0.94**, ndcg@10 0.80â†’0.90; on the broader 33-q set hybrid recall@10 0.86 (wide terms cap it). é»„و‍په¢ƒ chapter mode = **31/31** distinct chapters; block mode exhaustive (50). **/review-impl:** MED-1 (confounded headline â†’ re-measured isolated 0.953), MED-2 (cross-surface cap test+comment â€” chapter mode = 1 row/chapter across surfaces), LOW-3/4/5 documented. **Score-floor calibration finding:** bge-m3 cosine here is compressed [0.68â€“0.82] with poor neg/pos separation (ه°پç¥‍و¦œ 0.733 > a real positive 0.706) â†’ **no global threshold cleanly filters junk**; floor **OFF by default** (documented), real junk-rejection needs a reranker â†’ `D-RAWSEARCH-E5B-RERANK`.

**E5B cross-encoder rerank (XL, 2026-06-08):** the junk-rejection a global cosine floor couldn't do (E5 finding: bge-m3 cosine non-separable). External rerank service (separate repo, [integration guide](../integrations/2026-06-08-rerank-service-integration.md)) verified â€” Cohere-compatible `/v1/rerank` + load/unload/TTL; full-golden separation: positives median 0.86 vs negatives max 0.29 â†’ floor **0.30** rejects 5/5 negatives, ~0 genuine positives lost. Plan [`2026-06-08-raw-search-e5b-integrate.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-raw-search-e5b-integrate.md). **Routed through provider-registry** (PO choice; platform-config `RERANK_URL`+token, NO BYOK credential/encryption). **provider-registry (Go):** `internal/provider/rerank.go` (`Rerank` Cohere-shape helper, no Adapter) + `internalRerank` handler + `POST /internal/rerank` + config `RERANK_*` (3 tests). **knowledge (Py):** `reranker_client.py`, `_apply_rerank` in `raw_search.py` (rerank fused top-`max(30,2*limit)` â†’ re-sort â†’ `min_rerank_score` floor; semantic+hybrid only, lexical skips; `rerank`/`min_rerank_score` params; **degrade-to-fusion** never-500), config + deps (+4 tests). compose `RERANK_*` env. harness `--rerank`. **go rerank tests + knowledge pytest 2086 pass.** **Live (full stack knowledgeâ†’provider-registryâ†’reranker):** 5/5 negatives â†’ **0 results** (`degraded={}` â€” rerank ran), positives kept rel **0.95â€“0.99**, hybrid **MRR 0.955â†’1.0**, ndcg@10 ~flat, recall@10 0.86â†’0.82 (precision/recall trade â€” `rerank=false`/`block` recover recall). **/review-impl:** MED-1 hypothesis testedâ†’downgraded (è›®ç¥‍و±  10â†’6 = correct precision, not coverage bug); LOW-1 (`pool_n=2*limit`) + LOW-2 (docstring) fixed; LOW-3/4/5 deferred.

Closed 2026-06-08; revisit only if a concrete redundancy problem surfaces.

**State: M0 + M1(aâ€“d) + M2 + M3 + M4(aâ€“d) + config-plumbing + M5(aâ€“d) + M6(a + b-1 + b-2) + M7(a + b + c-1 + c-2 + c-3 + d-1 + d-2 + d-3) DONE** (ًںڈپ **M7 feedbackâ†’learning track COMPLETE** â€” all 3 channels + judge SDK + judge wired + worker feed; remaining = live-smokes + PR) (**M1d + M4d-1 + M4d-2(a/b/c) + glossary-versioning(VG-1/2/3) + M6b-1/b-2 targeted-propagate DONE 2026-06-07/08**). **ًںڈپ Translation V3 plan-of-record COMPLETE â€” all milestones M0â€“M6 shipped incl. the full human-fix flywheel (M6a confirm â†’ M6b-1 targeted per-language stale â†’ M6b-2 surface + user-triggered re-translate); M4d-2 full 2-pass cold-start + the glossary entity-versioning epic landed.**

**ًں†• M7 â€” Translation Feedback â†’ Learning (NEW track, 2026-06-08).** Production-readiness gate: translation was **not wired to learning-service at all** â€” no signal collected for future tuning (PO: won't merge to main until translation production-ready). User priority: capture **human review + adjustment** + an **LLM-action log**. **Spec:** [`2026-06-08-translation-feedback-to-learning.md`](../specs/2026-06-08-translation-feedback-to-learning.md). **PO (CLARIFY 2026-06-08):** 3 channels, **build the human-edit feature** (M7c â€” it doesn't exist yet; `TranslationViewer` is read-only), slice per channel + checkpoint, no AMAW. Slices: **M7a** Channel-2 LLM-log آ· **M7b** Channel-1a existing human signals آ· **M7c** Channel-1b human-edit + before/after gold آ· **M7d** Channel-3 online judge.

**M7a shipped (Channel 2 â€” LLM action log, cross-service, 2026-06-08).** translation `chapter_worker._emit_translation_quality` emits `translation.quality` (**`aggregate_type='translation'` â†’ auto-routes to `loreweave:events:translation`** â€” the relay keys the stream by aggregate_type, so NO compose/relay change + translation DB already a source) carrying the V3 verifier rollup + per-issue-type counts; **skips when `quality_score` NULL (V2)**; **post-commit + best-effort** (telemetry must not roll back a translation). learning `+loreweave:events:translation` stream + `handle_translation_quality` (mirrors Q3 chat-feedback) â†’ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='translation', metric='translation_quality_score', source='auto')` + dispatcher register + score_config seed; one metric/event (dedup `origin_service`+`outbox_id`) with the breakdown stashed in `comment`. **500 translation + 113 learning passed.** **/review-impl: 1 HIGH + 1 MED fixed** â€” HIGH: `quality_score()` is an int **[0,100]** but the score_config is **[0,1]** â†’ would have DLQ'd **100% of events (zero data collected)**; fixed by normalising `/100` at emit (+ realistic 0-100 tests incl. `100â†’1.0`). MED: emit was in the persist txn â†’ moved post-commit/best-effort. *(This HIGH is the same cross-service scale-mismatch bug class logged in memory.)* Live-smoke deferred â†’ **D-TRANSL-M7A-LIVE-SMOKE**.

**M7d-3 shipped (Channel 3 â€” worker feed, 2026-06-08). ًںڈپ LAST M7 slice â€” closes the feedbackâ†’learning track.** translation `chapter_worker._emit_translation_quality` now carries a truncated `source_text` + `translated_text` in the `translation.quality` payload (the exact keys the M7d-2 hook reads) **when `translation_judge_feed_enabled` is on (off by default)** â†’ activates the online fidelity judge end-to-end. config `+translation_judge_feed_enabled=False` + `+translation_judge_feed_max_chars=2000` (**INDEPENDENT** of learning's `online_translation_judge_enabled` â€” both must be on for a judge to actually run, so feed-on alone is harmless = a clean double-gate). Off-default â‡’ payload **byte-identical to M7a**; empty source (block chapter w/ empty `text_content`) â‡’ feed skipped, hook inert. Single-service (translation only). **513 py (+6 feed tests).** **/review-impl: 1 MED fixed** â€” independent **char**-truncation of source vs translation misaligns the story span across languages (2000 zh chars â‰« 2000 vi chars of story â†’ judge reads the translation as "omits the back half" â†’ systematically low fidelity for the CJKâ†’Latin pairs this channel tunes; the **cross-service-normalization-bug-class** in memory). Fixed: sample both by the **same fraction** of their own length (`frac = min(1, cap/len(src), cap/len(tr))`), so spans align AND stay â‰¤ cap; `cap<=0` now skips the feed; +asymmetric-length + cap-guard tests. Live activation (feedâ†’judge E2E) rides with **D-TRANSL-M7D-INLINE-JUDGE** (judge stays OFF until out-of-band). **ًںڈپ M7 = a+b+c-1+c-2+c-3+d-1+d-2+d-3 ALL DONE.**

**M7d-2 shipped (Channel 3 â€” judge wired into learning, 2026-06-08).** learning consumes the SDK fidelity judge. config `+online_translation_judge_enabled` (off; reuses the `online_judge_model_ref/source/user_id` + `provider_registry_internal_url` + `internal_service_token`). `db/online_translation_judge.py`: `run_translation_judge` (wraps `judge_translation_fidelity`) + `persist_translation_judge` â†’ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='translation', metric='translation_judge_fidelity', source='auto', origin_event_id='judge:<outbox_id>'` â€” **distinct from M7a's bare `<outbox_id>` so no double-row from the same event** â€” `comment={reason,judge_model,panel_safe:false}`). `handle_translation_quality` `+_maybe_judge_translation` hook: gated (enabled âˆ§ model âˆ§ event carries source+translated [the M7d-3 feed]) + best-effort + lazy-import. score_config seeded. **130 learning passed (+5).** **/review-impl: 0 HIGH; 1 MED DEFERRED** â€” the judge runs **inline** in the main learning consumer â†’ an LLM call blocks the loop (all streams) when enabled; off-by-default = zero shipped impact, but **keep `online_translation_judge_enabled` OFF until the judge runs out-of-band + sampled** (D-TRANSL-M7D-INLINE-JUDGE). **Inert until M7d-3** (the worker feed) â€” the LAST M7 slice.

**M7d-1 shipped (Channel 3 â€” SDK translation-fidelity judge, 2026-06-08).** First sub-slice of M7d (PO: full production feed + judge in `loreweave_eval`; M7d sub-sliced d-1 SDK judge â†’ d-2 learning run/persist/config/handler-hook â†’ d-3 worker inline feed off-default). `loreweave_eval.llm_judge` `+judge_translation_fidelity(source, translated) â†’ FidelityVerdict(score[0,1], reason)` + `_FIDELITY_SYSTEM` prompt (rate meaning-fidelity, NOT fluency; JSON `{score,reason}`), built on the shared `_call_judge` + `_extract_json_object` (one LLM call, best-effort `None` on empty/bad/out-of-range/non-completed). Reuses the `JudgeLLMClient` Protocol (same as `judge_precision`). **SDK fidelity 6/6 + eval suite 29 (no regression).** **/review-impl: 1 LOW-MED fixed** â€” the test now asserts the judge is *fed* source+translated correctly labeled (a swap would fail), not just that the response parses. SDK-only; prompt accuracy live-validates when M7d-2/3 wire it. **M7d-2 (learning) + M7d-3 (worker feed) remain â€” the last M7 work.**

Live-smoke deferred â†’ **D-TRANSL-M7C3-LIVE-SMOKE**. **ًںڈپ Channel 1 (human signals) complete: M7b accept + M7c human-edit + M7c-3 name-confirm. M7d (online judge) is the last M7 slice.**

**M1b shipped:** `v3/corrector.py` re-translates high-severity blocks once (rule-triggered, single pass) with **keep-if-improved** (only splices a correction that reduces the block's high count â€” never persists a worse draft); spliced into the returned blocks â†’ persist round-1 issues + rollup (`qa_rounds_used`). `/review-impl`: keep-if-improved guard (MED-1) + thinking-suppression parity (LOW-2).

No lexicon, no verifier check (prompt nudge, PO decision).

**M1 = M1aâœ“ M1bâœ“ M1câœ“ DONE. M1d DEFERRED** (PO 2026-06-07). The CLARIFY contract probe found M1d's glossary work needs glossary-service **code**: the internal `translation-glossary` + `select-for-context` endpoints expose **no** translation `confidence`/`status`/`alive` (the only endpoint with `confidence` is JWT-only `GET entities/{id}`), so the **trust ladder can't be applied service-to-service** without a glossary-service change; and `select-for-context` returns **bios/aliases, not translations** â†’ it's an **M4 context source**, not a name-map swap.
